beats.speaker: RayRay
beats.text: Bro. BRO. You're Amber's friend? I'm Amber's friend. We're FRIENDS, bro.
He produces a phone. The screen is cracked into a cubist masterpiece. A pit bull stares out from it.

beats.speaker: RayRay
beats.text: That's Mango. Mango's a good boy. Mango bit a guy ONCE and the guy DESERVED it.

beats.speaker: RayRay
beats.text: Listen — listen — my buddy's having a BBQ later. You should pull up. You should TOTALLY pull up.

beats.speaker: RayRay
beats.text: BRO. I KNEW you were good people.
He hugs you. The hug lasts a beat too long. He smells like Axe and motor oil.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: Maybe. We'll see. Probably not. Definitely maybe.

beats.speaker: RayRay
beats.text: Cool cool cool. No pressure. NO PRESSURE.
